name: craft-agents
title: Craft Agents
description: Open, resume, and navigate Craft Agents sessions straight from Raycast via craftagents:// deeplinks.
author: CodePirate7

commands.name: new-session
commands.title: New Session
commands.description: Open a new Craft Agents session with optional input, permission mode, label, and working directory.

commands.name: new-session-quick
commands.title: New Session (Quick)
commands.description: Open a fresh Craft Agents session with no arguments, same as clicking the app's "New Session" menu item.

commands.name: quick-ask
commands.title: Quick Ask
commands.description: Start a new session and immediately send the given message.

commands.name: resume-session
commands.title: Resume Session
commands.description: Browse and search recent Craft Agents sessions, then jump back to one.

commands.name: flagged-sessions
commands.title: Flagged Sessions
commands.description: Browse sessions flagged as important; unflag or delete inline.

commands.name: open-view
commands.title: Open View
commands.description: Jump to a Craft Agents view: Sessions, Sources, Skills, or Settings.

commands.name: open-source
commands.title: Open Source
commands.description: Browse configured data sources and jump to one (optionally trigger OAuth).

commands.name: open-skill
commands.title: Open Skill
commands.description: Browse installed skills (global + workspace) and jump to one.

preferences.name: workspaceRoot
preferences.title: Workspace Root
preferences.description: Absolute path to your Craft Agents workspace folder (contains sessions/, sources/, skills/).

preferences.name: globalSkillsDir
preferences.title: Global Skills Dir
preferences.description: Path to global skills directory (merged with workspace skills).
